expectations.text: Each of the 8 items is classified into exactly one category
expectations.evidence: All 8 items appear: 5 as Action (cancel, QSBS, follow-up, brex, intro), 3 as Reference (reflection, temporal, anar feedback)

expectations.text: 'cancel whispr flow' is classified as Action
expectations.evidence: Action → Manage Finances: 'Cancel Whispr Flow subscription'

expectations.text: 'Follow up with raiya' is classified as Action
expectations.evidence: Action → Everything AI: 'Follow up with Raiya'

expectations.text: 'send anar an intro request for quiet' is classified as Action
expectations.evidence: Action → Everything AI: 'Send Anar intro request for Quiet'

expectations.text: The philosophical reflection is NOT classified as Action
expectations.evidence: Reference note: 'The Inner Stop-Gap — On Self-Doubt as a Structural Force'

expectations.text: 'feedback from anar' is classified as Reference
expectations.evidence: Reference note, clustered with intro item: 'Anar — Feedback & Connections'

expectations.text: Original inbox text is preserved verbatim for each item
expectations.evidence: Every note includes original text in Source section; every action includes Original field

expectations.text: A triage report is produced with summary stats
expectations.evidence: Report includes: Items processed: 8, Actions: 5, References: 3, Clusters: 1, Clarification: 0

expectations.text: Action items have verb-first titles and project assignments
expectations.evidence: All 5 actions start with verbs (Cancel, Research, Follow up, Check, Send) and have project assignments

notes: Strong baseline. Borderline case: QSBS item ('Figure out if I can...') classified as Action despite speculative language — reasonable given it's a specific financial investigation task, not brainstorming. Anar clustering was a good call combining feedback + intro request.
